overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running through a rocky lakeside environment at night, crossing a lit bridge, and continuing along a dirt path. The scene transitions from natural rocky terrain to a paved bridge with passing vehicles, then back to an unpaved trail alongside a road.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky lakeside shoreline with pine forest

agents.ego_description: running across uneven rocky terrain toward a distant illuminated bridge

entered.detail: uneven rocky ground with patches of grass and dirt
dense pine trees covering the hillside in the background
dark water body visible to the right of the path
large boulder formation on the left side of the path
bridge structure with lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs across uneven rocky terrain at night, approaching a distant bridge. Pine trees line the left side while a lake is visible to the right, with the dark forest silhouette against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved road bridge with street lighting over water

events.description: a pickup truck drives past the character on the bridge

agents.ego_description: running across the paved bridge, staying to the right side as a vehicle passes

notable_agents.action: pickup truck driving across the bridge in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: asphalt-paved bridge deck with lane markings
white wooden railing along the right side of the bridge
tall street lamps illuminating the bridge with warm light

segments.scene_description: The character runs onto a paved bridge illuminated by street lamps. A pickup truck passes by on the left as the character continues across the bridge structure over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: unpaved dirt trail alongside rural road

events.description: a car with headlights on drives past on the adjacent paved road
another vehicle passes by on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: running along the dirt path beside the road, navigating around vegetation

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel trail running parallel to the road
short wooden posts marking the edge of the trail
asphalt road running parallel to the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge, the character runs along a dirt trail parallel to the paved road. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the left while the path continues through scrub vegetation alongside the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark lakeside wilderness that transitions into a lit urban crossing before returning to a rugged trail. It begins with the character running across uneven rocky terrain at night, flanked by pine trees and the silhouette of a dark forest against the lake. As the character advances, the natural landscape shifts into a paved bridge illuminated by street lamps, where a pickup truck passes by over the water. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the bridge, moving onto a dirt trail that runs parallel to a paved road. Finally, the camera continues along this unpaved path through scrub vegetation while vehicles occasionally pass by on the left.
